prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约23825→24307→24879→32010→27089，2024年因新高考首年出现明显位次后移（较2023年下降约7131名），2025年大幅回升至27089名 ，回升约4921名，显示新高考模式下位次波动较大；2025年基准约27089名；本省物理类计划2021年4182人、2022年4669人、2023年4721人、2024年4826人、202 5年4878人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划5023人，较2025年扩招约145人（+2.97%），扩招幅度温和，对竞争压力有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一 流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第101名，近年排名在90–104名之间波动，整体稳定，属于中游211院校；2023年曾出现师德师风相关偏负面舆情（运动会着装事 件），但近年无重大声誉事件；抖音热度总排名第84，评价为“一般”，短视频曝光量处于中游水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；第五轮学科评估中安徽大学 无A-及以上学科记录，优势学科主要集中在B+及以下层次，学科竞争力在211院校中相对一般，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气 工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与安徽大学物理类招生专业高度重合，可能吸引更多考生报考；安徽省2026年总考生约451000人，按近年比例估算物理类约31.3万 人，较2025年物理类32.1万人略有减少，但总考生规模扩大，竞争格局总体稳定；安徽大学位于合肥市，为本省唯一省属 211综合类大学，本省招生占比极高（物理类2025年4878人中绝大部分面向省内），本地考生报考意愿强烈，地域偏好对位次有支撑作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅 回升后的基准、2026年小幅扩招（+2.97%）对竞争的缓解、以及计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续高热吸引考生等因素，考虑考生总数增加及专业 热度带来的竞争加剧，微调+30名；预测2026年物理类最低位次约27602名，区间27102–28100名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for Physics category: approximately 23825 → 24307 → 24879 → 32010 → 27089. In 2024, due to the first year of the new Gaokao, there was a significant ranking decline (about 7131 places lower than 2023). In 2025, it rebounded sharply to 27089, an increase of about 4921 places, indicating large fluctuations under the new Gaokao model. The 2025 baseline is approximately 27089. Provincial Physics category enrollment plans: 2021: 4182, 2022: 4669, 2023: 4721, 2024: 4826, 2025: 4878, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 5023, an increase of about 145 students (+2.97%) compared to 2025, a moderate expansion that somewhat alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university. Soft Science main ranking: approximately 101st in 2026, fluctuating between 90–104 in recent years, overall stable, belonging to mid-tier 211 universities. In 2023, there was a negative public opinion incident related to teacher ethics (sports uniform incident), but no major reputation events in recent years. Douyin heat total ranking: 84th, rated as 'average', short video exposure at mid-level, no obvious signal of increased application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Anhui University has no A- or above disciplines; its advantageous disciplines are mainly at B+ and below, with relatively average disciplinary competitiveness among 211 universities, limiting appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular and recommended, and they overlap significantly with Anhui University's Physics category enrollment, potentially attracting more applicants. In 2026, total examinees in Anhui Province are approximately 451,000; based on recent proportions, Physics category candidates are estimated at about 313,000, slightly fewer than 2025's 321,000, but the overall examinee pool has expanded, maintaining a stable competition landscape. Anhui University is located in Hefei, the only provincial 211 comprehensive university in the province, with an extremely high proportion of in-province enrollment (most of the 4878 Physics category students in 2025 are from within the province). Local candidates have strong willingness to apply, and regional preference supports the ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline after the significant rebound in 2025, the moderate expansion in 2026 (+2.97%) easing competition, and the sustained high popularity of majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information attracting candidates, as well as the increased total examinee count and competition from major popularity, a slight adjustment of +30 places is made. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking for Physics category is approximately 27602, with a range of 27102–28100.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 27102–28100, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 popular majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 less popular majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 27000), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. If the ranking is near the upper bound (e.g., beyond 28000), focus on Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 as safety, and be cautious about aiming for Tier 1.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for History category: approximately 4492→4482→4811→5499→5185. 2021–2022 basically flat, 2023 slightly shifted back, 2024 due to first year of new Gaokao rankings significantly shifted back (down about 688 places from 2023), 2025 rebounded to 5185 (up about 314 places from 2024); 2025 baseline approximately 5185; provincial History enrollment plan: 2021 1150, 2022 1150, 2023 1190, 2024 1190, 2025 1190, stable in recent years; 2026 plan 1180, a reduction of 10 (-0.84%) from 2025, extremely small reduction, limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking 2026 approximately 101st, stable in recent years, mid-tier 211 university; in 2023 there was a somewhat negative public opinion related to teacher ethics, but no major reputation events in recent years; Douyin heat total ranking 84th, rated as 'average', no obvious signal of increased or decreased application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Anhui University has no A- or above discipline records, liberal arts advantageous disciplines are not prominent, relatively limited appeal to high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language and Literature and other liberal arts majors have social heat as recommended/differentiated wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; Anhui Province 2026 total examinees approximately 451,000, estimated History category about 138,000 based on recent proportions, slightly decreased from 2025's 141,000, competition pressure slightly eased; Anhui University is located in Hefei, the only provincial 211 comprehensive university in the province, the vast majority of History enrollment plan is for in-province students, local candidates have strong willingness to apply, regional preference supports rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline after the slight rebound in 2025 rankings, the very small enrollment reduction (-0.84%) in 2026 which slightly intensifies competition, and the slight decrease in total History examinees, considering the easing of competition due to fewer examinees, adjust by -20 places; predict 2026 History minimum ranking approximately 5139, range 4639–5639.
